title: U.S. Embassy/Consulate-Specific Information
content:
### Worldwide Caution: The Department of State advises Americans worldwide to exercise increased caution.

### Americans in the Middle East: Americans in the Middle East should follow the latest guidance from the nearest U.S. embassy or consulate and can contact the U.S. Department of State to receive information or assistance.

## U.S. Embassy/Consulate-Specific Information

## K1, K3 Visa Processing
Several U.S. Embassies and Consulates provide information to assist applicants in collecting the documentation needed for their K visa interview.
For additional information please choose the city where your visa interview will take place from the list of countries.
Please visit K1 / K3 Supplements by Post to review Embassy/Consulate instructions.
